title: Looking for Category Manager at Delhivery

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Delhivery
jsonLd.description:
Delhivery invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
